pr_body: Adds a searchUsers handler that looks up users by name.
author: contributor

triage: {"file_tiers": {"src/search.js": "deep"}, "overall_risk": "high", "relevant_dimensions": ["security"], "reasoning": "Deep-review the JS search handler introducing a concatenated SQL query."}
analyze: {"findings": [{"finding_type": "sql_injection", "evidence_tier": "judged", "query_match_id": null, "trace_path": null, "title": "SQL injection via string-concatenated query in searchUsers", "description": "searchUsers() builds a SQL query by concatenating the untrusted req.query.q value straight into the WHERE clause, then executes it. An attacker controls the query. Use a parameterized query instead.", "evidence": "  const query = \"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '\" + req.query.q + \"'\";", "line_start": 5, "line_end": 5, "trace_candidates": []}]}
